description: Analyst Recommendations & Changes score representing a change in recommendation by an analyst firm
Composite Sentiment Score (0–100) combining multiple sentiment analysis techniques for the story
Sentiment score from the BCA classifier specializing in reports on corporate action announcements
Earnings Evaluations classifier sentiment score for earnings evaluation stories
Sentiment score from the BER classifier specializing in earnings releases
Sentiment score from the BMQ classifier specializing in short commentary and editorials on global equity markets
Total number of entity records RavenPack publishes for a given news story
A score between 0 and 100 indicating how strongly related the entity is to the news story; 100 means the entity plays a key role and is highly relevant
Event Novelty Score (0–100) indicating how new a story is within a 24-hour window in a specific package
Event Sentiment Score (0–100) measuring entity sentiment based on proxies; higher values are more positive, below 50 negative
Sentiment score from the PEQ classifier specializing in detecting positive/negative phrases in global equities articles
Global Event Novelty Score (0–100) indicating novelty across all providers within a 24-hour window
Global event novelty elapsed time in milliseconds between the first story and the current story across all providers
Number of days since a similar story was detected across all RavenPack editions (Dow Jones, Web, PR)
Sentiment score from the BAM classifier specializing in venture, company, mergers and acquisitions news
Multi Classifier for Equities sentiment score derived from BMQ, BEE, BCA, and ANL_CHG, applied to the most relevant companies in a story
Score representing sentiment according to the corporate actions classifier
A sentiment score from the BCA classifier specialized in reports on corporate action announcements
Score from 0 to 100 measuring the ratio of positive to total non-neutral events over a rolling 91-day window within the package, based on ESS>50 as positive and ESS<50 as negative
0–100 ratio of positive events (ESS>50) to total non-neutral events over a rolling 91-day window within the package
Score representing sentiment according to the mergers and acquisitions classifier
A sentiment score from the BAM classifier specialized in mergers, acquisitions, and takeovers for equities news stories
Earnings evaluations sentiment score from the BEE classifier
Sentiment score from the BEE classifier focused on earnings evaluations
Earnings releases sentiment score from the BER classifier specialized in earnings release news
A sentiment score from the BER classifier specialized in earnings releases
A unique tag to label, identify, and recognize a particular type and property of an entity-specific news event
Two-character ISO-3166 country code associated with the entity (companies by incorporation, currencies by central bank; commodities may be XX)
Two-letter ISO-3166 country code associated with the entity (companies by incorporation; currencies by central bank; commodities use XX)
Event Novelty Score (0–100) indicating how new the story is within a 24-hour window for this package
Event Novelty Score between 0 and 100 indicating how new a story is within a 24-hour window in the package
Milliseconds elapsed between the first story and the current story within the event novelty chain for this package (first story = 0)
Milliseconds elapsed since the first story in the event novelty chain within the package (first story = 0)
An alphanumeric identifier that provides a way to chain or relate stories about the same categorized event for the same entities.
Number of days since a similar story was detected in this RPNA edition, from 0.00000 to 100.00000 where 100.00000 means 100+ days and 0.00000 means an identical timestamp
Days since a similar story in this edition; 0.00000–100.00000 (100 = 100+ days, 0 = identical timestamp)

Granular sentiment score from 0 to 100 for the entity in the story; higher values indicate more positive short-term financial/economic sentiment and values below 50 indicate negative sentiment, derived from expert-labeled patterns
Event Sentiment Score (0–100) indicating short-term sentiment for the entity; higher is more positive, below 50 is negative
A period of time used to measure changes from previous levels in an event.
Global event novelty score from 0 to 100 indicating how new the story is within a 24 hour window across providers
Global Event Novelty Score (0–100) measuring how new a story is within a 24-hour window across all providers
Milliseconds elapsed between the first and current story in the global event novelty chain across all news providers
Milliseconds elapsed since the first story in the global event novelty chain across all providers
An alphanumeric identifier that provides a way to chain or relate stories about the same categorized event for the same entities across all news providers.
Number of days since a similar story was detected across all product editions
Group-level novelty similarity gap metric (0–1); lower values indicate greater similarity/possible echoes
Score representing changes in analyst recommendations
A numerical score representing analyst recommendation changes in the Equities package
A collection of related events.
For events related to debt, this named attribute indicates the period of time for which a financial instrument remains outstanding.
Code classifying the type of news story or document (e.g., news, press release), per module codebook
Categorical classification of the news document type, resolved via the module-local codebook
News Impact Projections score (0–100) estimating market impact over the following two hours, conditional on time of arrival
News Impact Projections score from 0 to 100 estimating market impact over the next two hours, with time-of-day dependent thresholds
The position held by an individual within the entity involved in a specific news event.
Identifies which subscription package contains the record
A named attribute of an event such as an entity, role, or string extracted from a matched event type. When applicable, the role played by the entity in the story is detected and tagged
Multi-classifier for equities sentiment score combining outputs from BMQ, BEE, BCA, and ANL-CHG, applied to the most relevant companies mentioned in a story
Multi-classifier equities sentiment score derived from BMQ, BEE, BCA, and ANL_CHG, applied to the most relevant companies in a story
PEQ classifier score for global equities sentiment based on words/phrases in the article
Sentiment score from the PEQ classifier for global equities news, indicating the positive/negative tone of the item
Editorials & Commentary classifier score for the story (equities package)
Score representing editorials and commentary content in the news
Score from 0 to 100 indicating how strongly the entity is related to the news story, with 100 meaning the entity plays a key role
0–100 score indicating how strongly the entity is related to the news story; higher means more central, 100 indicates a key role
Total number of entity records (events) published by RavenPack for the given news story
Total number of events in the story chain
Ordinal position of the entity record within a story, less than or equal to RP_STORY_EVENT_COUNT
Ordinal position of this entity record within the story, less than or equal to RP_STORY_EVENT_COUNT
Composite sentiment score from 0 to 100 representing overall story sentiment
Composite Sentiment Score from 0 to 100 combining multiple sentiment analysis techniques for the story
A subdivision of a particular class of events
Time component of the record timestamp
Time of the record or event within the day
A subject or theme of events detected
A class of events, the constituents of which share similar characteristics
Aggregate Event Volume over the past 91 days for an entity, counting non-neutral events (ESS ≠ 50) from qualifying news that received an ESS score, signaling volume of highly relevant news
Count of non-neutral events for the entity over a rolling 91-day window within the package, including events with ESS above or below 50 and excluding ESS=50
News Impact Projections score (0-100) estimating the market impact over the next two hours, dependent on time of day
Count of non-neutral events for an entity over a rolling 91-day window within a package; counts events with ESS above and below 50, excludes ESS=50
Event novelty elapsed time in milliseconds between the first story and the current story within a specific package; first story is 0
Days since a similar story was detected in this specific edition; 0 means identical timestamp, 100 means 100 or more days
Granular 0–100 score: ratio of positive to total non-neutral events over a rolling 91-day window within a package; ESS>50 positive, ESS<50 negative, ESS=50 excluded
